message:
The other day, I found myself in a bit of a comedic pickle. I was rummaging through my closet, looking for my old go-bag from last year’s preparedness drill. I swear it was in there, but all I could find were a pair of mismatched socks and a collection of dust bunnies that seemed to be plotting their escape! 

After a good laugh at my own expense, I realized that I really did need to get my act together. I mean, what good is a go-bag if I can’t even find it? So, I decided to take a few moments to refresh my family’s emergency plan and make sure our essentials are actually ready to go. Sometimes, we just need a little nudge to keep things in check, right? 

Have you ever had one of those moments where you thought you were prepared, only to find out you weren't? This little refresher helped me get back on track!
